event.title: A.E.S. - Block League tournament (online)

body.p: The Block League tournament is a team-based event sponsored by FSFE, played on the A.E.S. Luanti server (100% free software). 8 teams fight in a direct elimination tournament to reach the top. Anyone can participate and you have until 17 December to to do so. For more info check the announcement in our Matrix space: https://matrix.to/#/!fDiZRMhFSRQrppldBe:matrix.org/$83D_Di_Lw-YAmfenGU6d4xLK7-QZpJ4njpoZnFdkQwU

event.link: Join the A.E.S. server via the Luanti built-in serverlist
